raw: {"perspective": "Risk Manager", "findings": [{"severity": "CRITICAL", "file_or_area": "packages/swarm/archive/code_index.py", "issue": "Index builder fails due to incomplete AST parsing and skipped files; archived despite active dependency", "recommended_fix": "Move code_index.py out of archive/, fix AST parsing to handle incomplete syntax, and validate file inclusion against INDEXED_PATHS"}, {"severity": "CRITICAL", "file_or_area": "memory/swarm/code-index.json", "issue": "Index is empty (0 modules, 0 endpoints) despite recent timestamp, causing false confidence in agent tooling", "recommended_fix": "Rebuild index with verified parser and assert non-zero output in CI"}, {"severity": "HIGH", "file_or_area": "code-index.json", "issue": "Builder skips files in 'archive/' directory, but code_index.py itself is archived, creating self-defeating state", "recommended_fix": "Relocate active tooling out of archive/ to prevent operational decay"}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": "Index corruption compromises all agent decisions — current state is unsafe for autonomous execution", "next_files_to_read": ["packages/swarm/vola-builder.config.json"]}

findings.issue: Index builder fails due to incomplete AST parsing and skipped files; archived despite active dependency
findings.recommended_fix: Move code_index.py out of archive/, fix AST parsing to handle incomplete syntax, and validate file inclusion against INDEXED_PATHS

findings.issue: Index is empty (0 modules, 0 endpoints) despite recent timestamp, causing false confidence in agent tooling
findings.recommended_fix: Rebuild index with verified parser and assert non-zero output in CI

findings.issue: Builder skips files in 'archive/' directory, but code_index.py itself is archived, creating self-defeating state
findings.recommended_fix: Relocate active tooling out of archive/ to prevent operational decay

whistleblower_flag: Index corruption compromises all agent decisions — current state is unsafe for autonomous execution
